_comment: Declares every skill-bundled file that is derived from a repo canonical source. The repo is upstream; skills are downstream copies. scripts/check_skill_drift.py reads this file and fails CI when a copy diverges from its source. To add a pair: copy the canonical into _skills/<skill>/..., add an entry here, and (for conceptual) record the canonical sha256.

pairs.note: Byte-identical by contract. Edit the canonical, then re-sync the bundled copy and repackage the skill.

Different document types, not a stale copy. The repo _design-system.md is the portable token spec (232 lines); this skill file is the full case-study build manual with complete HTML/CSS (809 lines). They share the design tokens, not the purpose. Decision 2026-06-25: keep them distinct, detect-only. The repo spec (ultimately styles.css :root) is canonical for the tokens; do not merge or overwrite either doc. The check flags when the repo spec changes so the build manual's token values can be re-checked by hand, then run --update-hashes to acknowledge.
